seo.title: About Us
seo.description: SCIT Consulting is a boutique AI consultancy with 15+ years of experience in digital transformation across Europe. 35+ projects delivered across 6 industries.

hero.title: About SCIT Consulting
hero.subtitle: A boutique AI consultancy helping businesses transform with artificial intelligence.

mission.title: AI-First Digital Transformation
mission.paragraph1: SCIT Consulting is a boutique digital transformation consultancy. We specialize in helping businesses leverage artificial intelligence to automate processes, build intelligent systems, and transform their operations.
mission.paragraph2: Our team brings 15+ years of hands-on experience in executive consulting and organizational transformation across multiple European markets — including Portugal, Germany, Spain, and Czech Republic. We've worked in cities like Lisbon, Munich, Düsseldorf, Madrid, and Prague, giving us a deep understanding of diverse business cultures and needs.
mission.paragraph3: With over 35 projects delivered across industries such as IT & Technology, Financial Services, Retail & E-commerce, Manufacturing, Healthcare, and Telecommunications, we bring real-world expertise in AI agents, automation systems, conversational AI, and strategic consulting. Our boutique approach means every client gets senior-level attention and customized solutions.

highlights.title: Multi-Market Experience
highlights.description: Projects delivered across Lisbon, Munich, Düsseldorf, Madrid, and Prague.

highlights.title: 6+ Industries
highlights.description: IT, Financial Services, Retail, Manufacturing, Healthcare, and Telecom.

highlights.title: AI-Native Development
highlights.description: Purpose-built AI solutions using Claude, GPT, Gemini, and open-source models.

highlights.title: Boutique Approach
highlights.description: Senior-level expertise on every project, every time.

technologies.title: Our Technology Stack
technologies.subtitle: We choose the right tools for each project — never locked into a single vendor.

markets.title: Where We Operate
markets.subtitle: Based in Estonia, delivering across Europe.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: From enterprise consulting to AI-native solutions.

events.title: Consulting Roots
events.description: Started in enterprise consulting, leading digital transformation projects across Europe.

events.title: AI Focus
events.description: Shifted focus to artificial intelligence, building early automation and chatbot solutions.

events.title: SCIT Consulting Founded
events.description: Established SCIT Consulting in Estonia as an AI-native consultancy for European businesses.

events.title: AI Agents & LLMs
events.description: Expanded into custom AI agents, LLM integrations, and advanced automation using Claude, GPT, and Gemini.

events.title: 35+ Projects Milestone
events.description: Surpassed 35 projects across 6 industries with a 95% client satisfaction rate.

values.title: What Drives Us
values.subtitle: Our values shape how we work and the results we deliver.

items.title: Impact Over Hype
items.description: We focus on real business outcomes, not trendy tech demos.

items.title: Quality Over Speed
items.description: We build solutions that work reliably and scale sustainably.

items.title: Partnership Over Projects
items.description: We invest in long-term relationships, not one-off engagements.

items.title: Transparency Over Promises
items.description: We communicate honestly about what AI can and cannot do.

cta.title: Let's Build Something Great
